Release Notes for vl53l9-transform-c library

Copyright © 2026 STMicroelectronics

Purpose

The vl53l9-transformc-c library provides a lightweight C transform layer that allows to process raw data coming from the VL53L9 dToF 3D lidar. The input data is converted into application-friendly representations so that it can be consumed in higher-level firmware.

Update history

Main changes

Maintenance release

  • Comment out unreachable code to suppress compiler warning

Known limitations

Headline
Frame metadata are not exposed to the user yet.
Static allocation for processing buffer is not supported yet.

Backward compatibility

N/A

Dependencies

  • media-object

:::

Main changes

Maintenance release

  • Free all internal buffers in do_finalize call
  • Reduce rate norm padded input buffer size in bicubic interpolation

Known limitations

Headline
Frame metadata are not exposed to the user yet.
Static allocation for processing buffer is not supported yet.

Backward compatibility

N/A

Dependencies

  • media-object

Main changes

Maintenance release

  • Remove bypass-sharpener-algo control
  • Temporarily disable dmax execution

Known limitations

Headline
Frame metadata are not exposed to the user yet.
Static allocation for processing buffer is not supported yet.

Backward compatibility

N/A

Dependencies

  • media-object

Main changes

First release

Initial release.

Known limitations

Headline
Frame metadata are not exposed to the user yet.
Static allocation for processing buffer is not supported yet.

Backward compatibility

N/A

Dependencies

  • media-object

For complete documentation on STM32Cube Expansion Packages, visit: STM32Cube Expansion Packages
